mapper.select: SELECT SSN_OR_TAXID as ssnOrTaxid ,USR_NO as usrNo ,PARTY_NM as partyNm ,REGIST_DT as registDt ,REGIST_TM as registTm ,QUEST_RPLY_1 as questRply1 ,QUEST_RPLY_2 as questRply2 ,QUEST_RPLY_3 as questRply3 ,QUEST_RPLY_4 as questRply4 ,QUEST_RPLY_5 as questRply5 ,OTHR_INFO_1 as othrInfo1 ,OTHR_INFO_2 as othrInfo2 ,EMAIL_ADDR as emailAddr ,CNTCT_PLCE as cntctPlce FROM IB_NON_USE_PARTY_INSPCT WHERE USR_NO = #{userId} WITH UR
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO IB_NON_USE_PARTY_INSPCT ( SSN_OR_TAXID ,USR_NO ,PARTY_NM ,REGIST_DT ,REGIST_TM ,QUEST_RPLY_1 ,QUEST_RPLY_2 ,QUEST_RPLY_3 ,QUEST_RPLY_4 ,QUEST_RPLY_5 ,OTHR_INFO_1 ,OTHR_INFO_2 ,EMAIL_ADDR ,CNTCT_PLCE ) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(SSN_OR_TAXID)), 0) +1 FROM IB_NON_USE_PARTY_INSPCT WITH UR) ,#{userId} ,'' ,CURRENT DATE ,CURRENT TIME
,#{orgSeniorYn} ,''
,#{chnSeniorYn} ,''
,'' ,'' ,''
,VARCHAR_FORMAT(CURRENT TIMESTAMP, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ,''
,VARCHAR_FORMAT(CURRENT TIMESTAMP, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ,'' ,'' )
mapper.update: UPDATE IB_NON_USE_PARTY_INSPCT SET QUEST_RPLY_2 = #{chnSeniorYn} ,OTHR_INFO_2 = VARCHAR_FORMAT(CURRENT TIMESTAMP, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ,OTHR_INFO_1 = VARCHAR_FORMAT(CURRENT TIMESTAMP, 'YYYY-MM-DD') WHERE USR_NO = #{userId}
